name: AgentSmyth
oneliner: Autonomous agent platform for trading and investment — 5 specialist AI agents delivering real-time institutional-grade intelligence. 48 institutional customers.
finserv: 48 institutional customers ($2B–$50B AUM). BNY, Thomson Reuters backing.
thesis: AgentSmyth is the specialist agent archetype the thesis prioritises — a pure-play Research & Signal Intelligence agent already live with 48 institutional customers at BNY-scale. With Thomson Reuters and FinTech Collective backing, it validates that buy-side intelligence is the first agentic wedge into capital markets. The infrastructure layer connects here as the data-integrity and compliance backbone these research agents need to operate in regulated environments.
